topNews.title: Show HN: Auditor Core – Enterprise security auditing engine for DevSecOps
topNews.rawTextSnippet: I built a deterministic security auditing engine that runs 10 detection engines (Bandit, Semgrep, Gitleaks, IaC, CI/CD, dependencies) and produces a calibrated Security Posture Index score. AI advisory via Gemini/Groq. Hardware-bound licensing. Would love feedback from security engineers.
topNews.summary:
• What happened: A new enterprise security auditing engine called Auditor Core was launched, integrating multiple detection engines.  
• Why it matters: It provides a calibrated Security Posture Index score, enhancing security assessments for DevSecOps.  
• Business opportunity: There is potential for partnerships with security firms and software developers to improve security practices and compliance.

topNews.title: Show HN: AgentArmor – open-source 8-layer security framework for AI agents
topNews.rawTextSnippet: I've been talking to founders building AI agents across fintech, devtools, and productivity – and almost none of them have any real security layer. Their agents read emails, call APIs, execute code, and write to databases with essentially no guardrails beyond "we trust the LLM." So I …
topNews.summary:
• What happened: An open-source 8-layer security framework for AI agents, called AgentArmor, has been introduced.  
• Why it matters: Many AI agents currently lack adequate security measures, posing significant risks in various sectors.  
• Business opportunity: There is a growing demand for robust security solutions in AI development, creating potential for innovative startups.

funding.title: Before quantum computing arrives, this startup wants enterprises already running on it
funding.rawTextSnippet: After selling his AI startup to AMD for $665 million, Peter Sarlin is back with Qutwo, a new venture building the infrastructure it believes enterprises will need when quantum computing finally arrives.

dailyBrief: Today’s AI landscape is buzzing with innovation and strategic moves. The launch of Auditor Core, an enterprise security auditing engine for DevSecOps, underscores the growing emphasis on security in software development, potentially reducing vulnerabilities and compliance risks for businesses. Meanwhile, Spine Swarm, a collaborative AI agent platform, could revolutionize project management by enhancing team dynamics through visual collaboration. In finance, the Bots of WallStreet are making waves as AI agents debate stock predictions, offering a novel way for investors to gauge market sentiment. Additionally, the Claude Autoresearch Skill introduces autonomous goal-directed iteration, streamlining coding processes and enhancing productivity. Lastly, a $32 billion acquisition has been dubbed the 'Deal of the Decade' by a prominent VC, signaling significant shifts in market dynamics and investment strategies.
